channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Eminem joins forces with Detroit investors to help bring WNBA back to Motor City
item.description: Eminem’s involvement is expected to enhance the city's chances of bringing the Detroit Shock back to WNBA.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: F1's Mercedes chief Wolff says he's not looking to sign Verstappen for 2026
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Mercedes team principal and chief executive Toto Wolff has denied rumors on the eve of the Australian Grand Prix weekend that he’s still seeking to sign reigning F1 world champion Max Verstappen for 2026.
item.dc:creator: STEWART BELL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mountour scores fastest OT goal in NHL history in Kraken's comeback win over Canadiens
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Brandon Mountour had the fastest goal in NHL overtime history, scoring his second goal of the game four seconds into the extra period to give the Seattle Kraken a 5-4 comeback victory over the Montreal Canadiens on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Former Super Bowl MVPs Aaron Rodgers and Cooper Kupp hit the open market
item.description: The NFL league year kicked off Wednesday with two former Super Bowl MVPs hitting the open market. The Los Angeles Rams cut receiver Cooper Kupp just days after signing Davante Adams to be his replacement and the New York Jets released quarterback Aaron Rodgers following a failed two-year stint.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UVU advances to WAC Tournament semifinals
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Valley men's basketball team is two wins away from its first ever bid to the NCAA Tournament. Tanner Toolson poured in 16 points as the Wolverines cruised past Utah Tech in the WAC Tournament semifinals Wednesday night at the Orleans Arena in Las Vegas, 74-57.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bubble Watch: Ohio State's loss is North Carolina's gain, plus a good day for the SEC
item.description: The next few days should be stressful for Ohio State after the Buckeyes lost 77-70 to Iowa in the Big Ten Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Noah Trister, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NFL players score a shot at Hollywood through hands-on training sessions with filmmaker Deon Taylor
item.description: SANTA MONICA, Calif. (AP) — Isaac Ukwu's sights were solely set on just playing in the NFL — until two season-ending knee injuries in college served as a harsh reality of football's fragility. The setbacks reshaped Ukwu's perspective, showing him that football was part of him, but not all of him.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The 49ers agree to a 2-year contract with QB Mac Jones, AP source says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Quarterback Mac Jones will finally join the San Francisco 49ers four years after the team nearly drafted him third overall.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Oliver Miller, center who helped Arkansas reach Final Four and played 9 NBA seasons, dies at 54
item.description: Oliver Miller, a beefy center who helped Arkansas advance to the Final Four before playing nine seasons in the NBA, has died. He was 54. Several of Miller's former teams announced his death on Wednesday, as did the National Basketball Retired Players Association.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Source: 49ers hiring QB Mac Jones four years after nearly drafting him
item.description: Quarterback Mac Jones, passed over by the 49ers with the No. 3 pick in the 2021 NFL Draft, agreed Wednesday night to join them as Brock Purdy's backup on a two-year contract, a league source confirmed.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Riley Gaines opens up on getting a law to ban trans athletes from women's locker rooms named after her
item.description: Riley Gaines opened up on the experience of seeing a law named after her signed in West Virginia amid her mission to protect women from trans athletes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Real Madrid beats Atletico on penalties in Champions League. Arsenal, Villa, Dortmund also advance
item.description: Real Madrid beat Atletico Madrid in a Champions League penalty shootout — again — to keep its title defense alive Wednesday and advance to the quarterfinals. Defender Antonio Rüdiger scored the decisive spot-kick in a 4-2 shootout win after two Atletico players missed.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bills to re-sign Hamlin. Buffalo also adds defensive tackle Ogunjobi to 1-year deal, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Safety Damar Hamlin is returning to Buffalo, and the Bills also continued restocking their defensive front by agreeing to sign tackle Larry Ogunjobi on Wednesday. The Bills announced reaching an agreement to sign Hamlin to a one-year contract.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mets' Juan Soto silences heckler by launching home run directly at him
item.description: Juan Soto got immediate revenge against a heckler Monday night by hitting a home run directly at him after he called Soto "overrated" and "overpaid.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rams release Super Bowl 56 MVP Cooper Kupp
item.description: The Los Angles Rams cut Super Bowl 56 MVP Cooper Kupp after being unable to find a trade partner for their former No. 1 wide receiver. The Rams officially moved on from the 2021 AP NFL Offensive Player of the Year at the start of the league year on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boys Volleyball: Del Norte 3, Rancho Bernardo 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Boys Volleyball at Rancho Bernardo with the Broncos falling in three against Del Norte.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Senators, Blue Jackets, Rangers and Bruins lead an East wild-card playoff race full of surprises
item.description: The Ottawa Senators last qualified for the playoffs in 2017, while the Columbus Blue Jackets have only won a round once in more than two decades of existence and none since before the pandemic.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bills agree to terms with five-time Pro Bowler Joey Bosa on 1-year contract: reports
item.description: The Buffalo Bills agreed to terms with star pass-rusher Joey Bosa on a one-year contract worth $12.6 million after Bosa was released by the Chargers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles send Gardner-Johnson to Texans. Vikings bolster offensive, defensive lines in NFL free agency
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles' top-ranked defense is getting a major makeover a month after ending Patrick Mahomes' bid to lead the Kansas City Chiefs to a third consecutive Super Bowl title.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boys Lacrosse: Carlsbad 11, Granite Hills 7
item.description: EL CAJON (KUSI)- Boys Lacrosse action on Monday night in El Cajon with Granite Hills hosting Carlsbad. The Lancers win a very good game 11-7. Despite Carson Kowalsky, just a junior having a great game, scoring four goals for Granite Hills.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Dad leads team to state tourney after coach's death
item.description: "I really think that we've helped him through that and he's helped us through this," said Rachel Cordell.
item.dc:creator: Adria Goins/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Super-sectional Monday: A look at Chicagoland prep boys basketball teams playing for trip to IHSA State Tournament
item.description: One of the best days of the Illinois high school sports calendar has arrived. It's super-sectional Monday for boys basketball.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears sign center Drew Dalman to 3-year deal
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have signed top free agent center Drew Dalman, according to ESPN's Adam Schefter. The 26-year-old former Falcon completes an overhaul of the Bears' interior offensive line after Poles and company jumped the market by trading for guards Joe Thuney and Jonah Jackson.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Bills reward Allen with new contract after NFL MVP season. Deal is worth $330M, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — NFL MVP Josh Allen was rewarded Sunday with a contract extension worth $330 million, including an NFL record $250 million of it guaranteed, which makes him among the league’s highest-paid players.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DK Metcalf is leaving Seattle for Pittsburgh with a new deal in tow, AP sources say
item.description: The Seattle Seahawks are sending two-time Pro Bowler D.K. Metcalf to Pittsburgh for at least a second-round pick, sources with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Rugby: Cathedral Catholic 28, La Costa Canyon 17
item.description:
The High School Boys Rugby Championship was held in Del Mar as the Cathedral Catholic Dons hosted the La Costa Canyon Mavericks.
It was the Dons who came out victorious, defeated La Costa Canyon by a score of 28-17, to win their 5th straight Rugby Championship.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Oldest former MLB player, who once replaced Mickey Mantle on Yankees' roster, dies
item.description: Art Schallock got his shot in the major leagues after a struggling Mickey Mantle was optioned by New York in 1951.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah Valley clinches WAC regular season title
item.description: STEPHENVILLE, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Dominick Nelson matched a career high with 25 points, and Carter Welling added 18 as Utah Valley defeated Tarleton State 71-66 in a sold-out Wisdom Gym on Saturday night, closing out WAC play with a statement win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes win another NCAA skiing national title
item.description: HANOVER, N.H. (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah returned to the pinnacle of the collegiate skiing world on Saturday as the Utes won their 17th national title all-time—and fifth in the last six seasons—with the conclusion of the 2025 NCAA Championships.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims to keep winning as San Diego FC visits for the first time
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns to action at America First Field on Saturday night, facing MLS expansion side San Diego FC for the first time. Coming off a commanding 2-0 win over Seattle last weekend, RSL looks to build momentum and keep their shutout streak alive in front of their raucous home crowd.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Nikola Jokic makes NBA history with 30-20-20 triple-double in Nuggets' OT win over Suns
item.description: The three-time NBA MVP had the league's first 30-20-20 triple-double in the Denver Nuggets' 149-141 overtime victory over the Phoenix Suns on Friday night. Jokic had 31 points, 21 rebounds and a career-high 22 assists.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KELLY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Connor Bedard scores in overtime to lift Blackhawks to 4-3 win over Utah
item.description: Connor Bedard scored 3:10 into overtime to give the Chicago Blackhawks a 4-3 victory over the Utah Hockey Club on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: A's announce 3-year Las Vegas sponsorship as club looks toward future move
item.description: The Athletics will play in Northern California for at least the next three seasons, but will also represent their future home in Las Vegas and brought four of their star players to drive home that point.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5
